title: Athlete Profile
description: Schema for an athlete's profile in the AthleteView AI platform. Contains identity, physical attributes, biometric baselines, and device linkage.

id.description: Globally unique identifier for the athlete (UUID v4).

name.description: Full display name of the athlete.

sport.description: Primary sport the athlete participates in.

team.description: Team or club the athlete is affiliated with.

date_of_birth.description: Date of birth in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD).

device_id.description: Identifier of the primary wearable device assigned to the athlete, or null if none.

biometric_enabled.description: Whether real-time biometric monitoring is enabled for this athlete.

profile_image_url.description: URL to the athlete's profile image.

baseline_hr_rest.description: Resting heart rate baseline in beats per minute.

baseline_hr_max.description: Maximum heart rate baseline in beats per minute.

vo2_max.description: Maximum rate of oxygen consumption (VO2 max) in mL/kg/min.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata for custom extensions (e.g., sponsor info, notes).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the athlete profile was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the athlete profile was last updated.
